description: Deterministic second-wave fixtures for legacy Sun RPC compatibility symbols. The cases bind FrankenLibC's safe-default auth/client creation, DES-unavailable, invalid-fd reserved-port, local diagnostic, and unsupported broadcast behavior without network access, privileged port binding, host resolver state, or raw stderr text in structured logs.
spec_reference: glibc Sun RPC compatibility surface; FrankenLibC rpc_abi deterministic safe-default contract for authunix, reserved-port, callrpc, cbc_crypt, and clnt diagnostic helpers

cases.name: authunix_create_safe_default_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC UNIX auth creation compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns NULL because legacy RPC auth creation is unsupported
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic NULL result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: legacy UNIX auth creation is intentionally unsupported and fails closed without host RPC state

cases.name: authunix_create_safe_default_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC UNIX auth creation compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns NULL because legacy RPC auth creation is unsupported
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic NULL result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: legacy UNIX auth creation is intentionally unsupported and fails closed without host RPC state

cases.name: authunix_create_default_safe_default_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC default UNIX auth creation compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns NULL because host identity and RPC auth runtime are not consulted
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic NULL result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: default UNIX auth would otherwise depend on ambient host identity and RPC state

cases.name: authunix_create_default_safe_default_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC default UNIX auth creation compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns NULL because host identity and RPC auth runtime are not consulted
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic NULL result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: default UNIX auth would otherwise depend on ambient host identity and RPC state

cases.name: bindresvport_invalid_fd_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC reserved-port binding compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: uses fd -1 so no privileged port binding is attempted
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic EBADF error class; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: invalid fd exercises the reserved-port entrypoint without binding a real port

cases.name: bindresvport_invalid_fd_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC reserved-port binding compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: uses fd -1 so no privileged port binding is attempted
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic EBADF error class; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: invalid fd exercises the reserved-port entrypoint without binding a real port

cases.name: callrpc_safe_default_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC one-shot client call compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns 0 without contacting portmapper or host RPC services
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic failure result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: one-shot RPC calls are intentionally unsupported and fail closed without network access

cases.name: callrpc_safe_default_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC one-shot client call compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns 0 without contacting portmapper or host RPC services
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic failure result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: one-shot RPC calls are intentionally unsupported and fail closed without network access

cases.name: cbc_crypt_des_unavailable_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC DES CBC crypt compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns DESERR_NOHWDEVICE because DES RPC crypto is unsupported
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic unavailable result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: DES is deprecated and no hardware/device state is consulted

cases.name: cbc_crypt_des_unavailable_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC DES CBC crypt compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns DESERR_NOHWDEVICE because DES RPC crypto is unsupported
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic unavailable result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: DES is deprecated and no hardware/device state is consulted

cases.name: clnt_broadcast_unknown_proto_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC broadcast client compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns RPC_UNKNOWNPROTO without broadcasting on any interface
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic unsupported result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: broadcast RPC requires ambient network and portmapper state, so it fails closed

cases.name: clnt_broadcast_unknown_proto_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC broadcast client compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns RPC_UNKNOWNPROTO without broadcasting on any interface
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic unsupported result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: broadcast RPC requires ambient network and portmapper state, so it fails closed

cases.name: clnt_create_safe_default_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC generic client creation compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns NULL without resolving hosts or contacting portmapper
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic NULL result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: generic RPC client creation is intentionally unsupported and fails closed without resolver state

cases.name: clnt_create_safe_default_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC generic client creation compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns NULL without resolving hosts or contacting portmapper
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic NULL result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: generic RPC client creation is intentionally unsupported and fails closed without resolver state

cases.name: clnt_pcreateerror_local_diagnostic_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC client creation diagnostic emitter compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: writes a deterministic prefix-success diagnostic to a local pipe only
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic diagnostic class; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: diagnostic bytes are classified locally without exposing raw stderr text in fixture logs

cases.name: clnt_pcreateerror_local_diagnostic_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC client creation diagnostic emitter compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: writes a deterministic prefix-success diagnostic to a local pipe only
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic diagnostic class; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: diagnostic bytes are classified locally without exposing raw stderr text in fixture logs

cases.name: clnt_perrno_local_diagnostic_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC status diagnostic emitter compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: writes a deterministic RPC success diagnostic to a local pipe only
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic diagnostic class; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: diagnostic bytes are classified locally without exposing raw stderr text in fixture logs

cases.name: clnt_perrno_local_diagnostic_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC status diagnostic emitter compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: writes a deterministic RPC success diagnostic to a local pipe only
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic diagnostic class; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: diagnostic bytes are classified locally without exposing raw stderr text in fixture logs

cases.name: clnt_perror_noop_diagnostic_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC client diagnostic emitter safe-default compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: emits no diagnostic for a null client handle
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic no-op result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: client-handle diagnostics fail closed without dereferencing or consulting RPC state

cases.name: clnt_perror_noop_diagnostic_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC client diagnostic emitter safe-default compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: emits no diagnostic for a null client handle
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic no-op result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: client-handle diagnostics fail closed without dereferencing or consulting RPC state

cases.name: clnt_spcreateerror_string_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC client creation diagnostic string compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns a deterministic prefix-success diagnostic string
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic string class; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: string is produced from local thread state only, without resolver or network state

cases.name: clnt_spcreateerror_string_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC client creation diagnostic string compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns a deterministic prefix-success diagnostic string
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic string class; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: string is produced from local thread state only, without resolver or network state

cases.name: clnt_sperrno_string_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC status diagnostic string compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns the deterministic RPC success status string
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic string class; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: status string is produced from a fixed local table without resolver or network state

cases.name: clnt_sperrno_string_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC status diagnostic string compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns the deterministic RPC success status string
